Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.identity.impl.ldap

Class LdapIdentityProviderSession

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.identity.impl.ldap.LdapIdentityProviderSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.identity.ReadOnlyIdentityProvider, org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.interceptor.Session
public class LdapIdentityProviderSession extends Object implements org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.identity.ReadOnlyIdentityProvider

LDAP ReadOnlyIdentityProvider.

Author:
Daniel Meyer

    • getSortingControls

      protected List<Control> getSortingControls(org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.AbstractQuery<?,?> query)
      Return the list of Controls requested in the query. Query may be run on USERS or on GROUP
      Parameters:
      query - query asks, contains the order by requested
      Returns:
      list of control to send to LDAP

      protected void initializeControls(org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.AbstractQuery<?,?> query)
